title: onosma roussaei
intro: Onosma roussaei, also known as Roussae's Onosma, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Onosma roussaei include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as an antispasmodic to alleviate muscle spasms. Onosma roussaei can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
